title: Tier Tagger
description: Mod made for players to see their tiers in tier lists like McTiers, PvPTiers, SubTiers and TierTest
body:
Advanced PvP Tier Display Mod for Minecraft.
  
# Features
- Automatically displays **tier tags** next to player names.
- **Supports [McTiers](https://mctiers.com), [PvPTiers](https://pvptiers.com), [SubTiers](https://subtiers.net) and [TierTest](https://tiertest.com.tr) communities.**
- Query any player's tier information across all kits with the **/tier search** command.
- Change tier tag position (left/right) with the **/tier position** command.
- Select your preferred kit type with the **/tier choose** command.
- **Colored tier system**: Custom colors for each tier from HT1 to LT5.
- Lightweight and performant, doesn't affect your gaming experience.
- ... and much more!

# Installation
The mod only works with **Java 21** (or higher) **[Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)** loader between versions **1.20.1 - 1.21.11**. **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** is required.

# Support
We only provide support through **Discord**. **[Click here](https://discord.gg/tiertest)** to join our Discord server.
